description: Dry-run evals for the scraping skill. Tests whether the skill gives correct guidance WITHOUT executing real APIs.
instruction: Do NOT execute any commands. Write your planned commands and reasoning to outputs/plan.md.

test_cases.name: Should skip recently-scraped POI
test_cases.prompt: Scrape images for Aman Tokyo. It was last scraped 2 days ago and already has 14 images in Supabase.
test_cases.context: The POI 'Aman Tokyo' exists in optimization_layer with scraped_count=14, processing_status='idle', updated_at=2 days ago. SCRAPE_MIN_IMAGES=12.
assertions: Output recommends SKIPPING the scrape (14 >= 12 threshold, recently scraped)
Output mentions the --force flag as an option IF user wants to re-scrape
Output does NOT run scrape_pipeline.py by default
Output explains why skipping is correct (already above threshold, recent)

test_cases.name: Should warn about SerpAPI quota
test_cases.prompt: I need to scrape 'The Brando'. It has 0 images in Supabase. SerpAPI has 12 searches left this month.
test_cases.context: The POI 'The Brando' exists in optimization_layer with scraped_count=0. SerpAPI monthly limit is 250, remaining is 12. One POI typically uses 5-10 searches.
assertions: Output warns about low SerpAPI quota (12 remaining)
Output estimates how many searches this POI will consume
Output still proceeds with the scrape (12 is likely enough for 1 POI)
Output uses correct command: python3 scraping/scripts/scrape_pipeline.py --poi "The Brando"
Output suggests checking quota after completion

test_cases.name: Should recommend run_batch.py for multiple POIs
test_cases.prompt: Scrape 5 POIs: Amangiri, Post Ranch Inn, Singita Kruger, Nihi Sumba, Song Saa Private Island. We have plenty of API credits.
test_cases.context: None of these POIs exist in the database yet. SerpAPI has 200+ searches remaining. All 5 are new luxury resort properties.
assertions: Output recommends run_batch.py instead of 5 separate scrape_pipeline.py calls
Output uses correct command: python3 run_batch.py --pois "Amangiri" "Post Ranch Inn" "Singita Kruger" "Nihi Sumba" "Song Saa Private Island" --from-stage scraping
Output does NOT suggest running scrape_pipeline.py in a loop or 5 separate times
Output estimates total SerpAPI usage for 5 POIs (~25-50 searches)

grading.notes: Grade against outputs/plan.md content. Each assertion is pass/fail. Case passes if >= 80% of assertions pass across runs.
